---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    number_sections: yes
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#content{
    max-width:1920px;
}
```


```{r setup, echo=FALSE, results='hide'}
library(knitr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo=TRUE, 
  include=TRUE, 
  warning=FALSE, 
  message=FALSE, 
  results="asis"
)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)

source("reportFunctions.R")

option_tbl=fread("fileList1.fgsea.txt", data.table=FALSE)
myoptions=split(option_tbl$V1, option_tbl$V2)
msigdbr_species=myoptions$msigdbr_species
task_name=myoptions$task_name
email=myoptions$email
affiliation=get_affiliation(myoptions)

# Parse collections parameter: semicolon-separated, e.g. "H;C2;C2:CP:KEGG"
# Default to "H" (Hallmark) for backward compatibility
if(!is.null(myoptions$msigdbr_collections)){
  collections <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(myoptions$msigdbr_collections, ";")))
} else {
  collections <- "H"
}

collection_display_names <- c(
  "H" = "Hallmark",
  "C1" = "Positional",
  "C2" = "Curated",
  "C3" = "Regulatory Target",
  "C4" = "Computational",
  "C5" = "Ontology",
  "C6" = "Oncogenic Signatures",
  "C7" = "Immunologic Signatures",
  "C8" = "Cell Type Signatures"
)

parse_collection_spec <- function(spec) {
  parts <- strsplit(spec, ":", fixed=TRUE)[[1]]
  collection <- parts[1]
  if(length(parts) > 1) {
    subcollection <- paste(parts[-1], collapse=":")
  } else {
    subcollection <- NULL
  }
  base_name <- collection_display_names[collection]
  if(is.na(base_name)) base_name <- collection
  if(!is.null(subcollection)) {
    display_name <- paste0(base_name, " (", subcollection, ")")
  } else {
    display_name <- base_name
  }
  file_key <- tolower(gsub("[: ]", "_", spec))
  list(collection=collection, subcollection=subcollection, display_name=display_name, file_key=file_key)
}

de_files=fread("fileList2.fgsea.txt", header=FALSE, data.table=FALSE) |> 
  dplyr::rename(comparison=V2, gseaFile=V1) |>
  dplyr::select(comparison, gseaFile)
de_map=split(de_files$gseaFile, de_files$comparison)
```

---
title: "FGSEA - `r task_name`"
author:
  email: "`r email`"
  affiliation: "`r affiliation`"
---

# Preranked gene list

`r msigdbr_species` is used for the analysis.

Collections: `r paste(sapply(collections, function(x) parse_collection_spec(x)$display_name), collapse=", ")`

```{r}
print_table(de_files, row.names=F)
```

```{r}
set.seed(20260125)

gsea_content=""
gsea_files=NULL

# Pre-process rank files once (shared across all collections)
ranks_list <- list()
for(prefix in names(de_map)){
  gsea_file <- de_map[[prefix]][1]
  gsea_rnk <- fread(gsea_file) |> dplyr::rename(gene=V1, sigfvalue=V2)

  if(any(duplicated(gsea_rnk$gene))){
    #keep the one with the largest absolute sigfvalue
    gsea_rnk <- gsea_rnk |> 
      dplyr::mutate(abs_sigfvalue=abs(sigfvalue)) |>
      dplyr::arrange(gene, desc(abs_sigfvalue)) |> 
      dplyr::distinct(gene, .keep_all=TRUE) |>
      dplyr::arrange(desc(sigfvalue))
  }

  gsea_rnk <- gsea_rnk[!duplicated(gsea_rnk$gene),]
  ranks_list[[prefix]] <- setNames(gsea_rnk$sigfvalue, gsea_rnk$gene)
}

for(prefix in names(de_map)){
  gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, "# ", prefix, "\n\n")

  ranks <- ranks_list[[prefix]]

  # Loop over each gene set collection
  for(coll_spec in collections){
    coll_info <- parse_collection_spec(coll_spec)
    coll_display <- coll_info$display_name
    coll_display_file <- gsub("[: ()]+", "_", coll_display)
    coll_key <- coll_info$file_key

    gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, "## ", coll_display, "\n\n")

    # Get gene sets
    if(!is.null(coll_info$subcollection)){
      gene_sets <- msigdbr(species = msigdbr_species, collection = coll_info$collection, subcollection = coll_info$subcollection)
    } else {
      gene_sets <- msigdbr(species = msigdbr_species, collection = coll_info$collection)
    }
    gene_set_list <- split(gene_sets$gene_symbol, gene_sets$gs_name)

    gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, "Total gene sets in collection: ", length(gene_set_list), "\n\n")

    # Run fgsea
    fgsea_results <- fgsea(pathways = gene_set_list, 
                           stats = ranks,
                           minSize = 15,
                           maxSize = 500)

    # Sort by padj
    fgsea_results <- fgsea_results |> 
      as.data.frame() |> 
      dplyr::arrange(padj) |> 
      dplyr::mutate(Core=sapply(leadingEdge, length),
                    negLog10Padj = -log10(padj),
                    leadingEdgeGenes = sapply(leadingEdge, function(genes) paste(genes, collapse = ":"))) |>
      dplyr::select(-leadingEdge)

    # Save results
    fgsea_file <- paste0(prefix, ".", coll_display_file, ".csv")
    write.csv(fgsea_results, file = fgsea_file, quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
    gsea_files=rbind(gsea_files, data.frame(comparison=prefix, data_name=prefix, category=coll_display, file_key="gsea_file", file_path=fgsea_file))

    gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, getPagedTable(fgsea_file), "\n\n")

    # Display significant pathways
    sig_pathways <- fgsea_results |> dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
    if(nrow(sig_pathways) == 0){
      gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, "\nNo significant enriched geneset found\n\n")
      cur_df <- data.frame(prefix=prefix, collection=coll_display, fgsea_file=fgsea_file, fgsea_png=NA)
    }else{
      enriched_file <- paste0(prefix, ".", coll_display_file, ".enriched.csv")
      write.csv(sig_pathways, file = enriched_file, quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
      gsea_files=rbind(gsea_files, data.frame(comparison=prefix, data_name=prefix, category=coll_display, file_key="enriched_file", file_path=enriched_file))
  
      gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, "\nThere are ", nrow(sig_pathways), " significant enriched genesets. We will show top 10 positively and top 10 negatively associated gene sets.\n\n")

      pos_sig <- sig_pathways |> dplyr::filter(NES > 0)
      neg_sig <- sig_pathways |> dplyr::filter(NES < 0)

      final <- rbind(head(pos_sig, min(10, nrow(pos_sig))),
                     head(neg_sig, min(10, nrow(neg_sig))))

      final <- final[order(final$NES, decreasing=TRUE),]

      final$NAME <- gsub("HALLMARK_|REACTOME_|KEGG_|GOBP_", "", final$pathway)
      final$NAME <- factor(final$NAME, levels=final$NAME)
      size_breaks <- round(quantile(final$Core, probs=c(0, 0.5, 1)))
      size_breaks <- unique(sort(size_breaks))

      g <- ggplot(final, aes(NES, NAME)) + 
        geom_point(aes(size=Core, color=negLog10Padj)) + 
        geom_vline(xintercept=0) + 
        scale_size_continuous(breaks=size_breaks) +
        guides(color=guide_colorbar(barheight=unit(3, "lines"))) +
        theme_bw() + 
        xlab("Normalized enrichment score") +
        labs(color="-log10(Padj)") +
        theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

      height <- max(1000, 3000/40*nrow(final))
      ncharmax <- max(nchar(as.character(final$NAME)))
      width <- max(2000, ncharmax * 25 + 1000)

      fgsea_png <- paste0(prefix, ".", coll_display_file, ".png")
      ggsave(fgsea_png, g, width=width, height=height, units="px", dpi=300, bg="white")
      gsea_files=rbind(gsea_files, data.frame(comparison=prefix, data_name=prefix, category=coll_display, file_key="enriched_png", file_path=fgsea_png))

      gsea_content <- paste0(gsea_content, getFigure(fgsea_png), "\n\n")
    }
  }
}
write.csv(gsea_files, file=paste0(task_name, ".fgsea.files.csv"), quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE)

fgsea_rmd="fgsea_results.rmd"
writeLines(gsea_content, con=fgsea_rmd)
```

```{r child=fgsea_rmd}
```

# fgsea and msigdbr version

```{r}
gsea_db=msigdbr_collections()$db_version[1]
fgsea_version=as.character(packageVersion("fgsea"))
df=data.frame("software"=c("fgsea", "fgsea_db"), "version"=c(fgsea_version, gsea_db))
write.csv(df, file=paste0(task_name, ".version"), quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE)
print_table(df, row.names=FALSE)
```

# Session Info

```{r}
print_table(get_packages_table(), byDT=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
```
